_info: Written by louwok.com/admin. index.html reads this at runtime.

menu.name: Plain Fried Rice
menu.desc: The foundation. Egg, bean sprouts, and green onion cooked hot and fast in a screaming wok.

menu.name: Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc: All-white chicken, egg, bean sprouts, soy, and green onion. Classic done right.

menu.name: Beef Fried Rice
menu.desc: Sliced beef, wok-fired with egg, bean sprouts, and green onion.

menu.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
menu.desc: Plump shrimp, wok-fired with egg, green onion, and a splash of soy.

menu.name: Crab Rangoon
menu.desc: Crispy wonton cups filled with real crab and cream cheese. Fried to gold. Your choice of a 3pc. or 6pc. Sweet n' Sour sauce compliments this well.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Plain)
menu.desc: Egg foo young patty on soft white bread with lettuce, tomato, mayo and pickles. A Midwest icon.

menu.name: Pineapple Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc: Tender chicken, sweet pineapple, and wok-fired rice come together in the perfect balance of savory and sweet. A bold twist on a Midwest favorite, cooked fresh to order with Lou Wok flavor in every bite.

menu.name: Ultimate Fried Rice
menu.desc: Everything in one bowl. Beef, chicken, shrimp, bean sprouts & green onion. The works.

menu.name: Fried Chicken
menu.desc: Crispy, seasoned chicken fried golden brown and served hot and fresh. 4 piece or 8 piece

menu.name: Vess Soda
menu.desc: Your choice of a 20 fl oz bottle of Grape, Strawberry, Root Beer, Cream Soda, Fruit Punch, Pineapple, Peach

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Deluxe)
menu.desc: Beef, Chicken, Shrimp along with lettuce, tomato. Also includes base of egg foo young on soft white bread with mayo and pickles.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Veggie)
menu.desc: Broccoli, carrots, cabbage, green onions, bean sprouts served on soft white bread with lettuce, tomato & pickles.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Chicken, Shrimp or Beef)
menu.desc: Chicken, shrimp or beef along with based of egg foo young on soft white bread with lettuce, tomato,  and pickles.

menu.name: Mystic Carrot Juice
menu.desc: A bright, refreshing blend of fresh carrots and fruit juices, delivering a naturally sweet burst of goodness in every sip.

menu.name: Bottled Water
menu.desc: 16.9 fl oz. bottle of water on chill.

menu.name: Lou Wok Box Combo
menu.desc: The combo that put us on the map: a whole order of fried rice, 4 crispy fried chicken pieces, 4 crab rangoons, and a Vess Soda or Mystic Carrot Juice. St. Louis comfort food, wok-fired fresh in Phoenix.

menu.name: Egg Rolls (Chicken)
menu.desc: Golden, crispy, and packed with seasoned chicken, cabbage, celery, and savory spices, our chicken egg roll is the perfect sidekick to any Lou Wok meal. A St. Louis takeout classic done the Midwest wayâhot, crunchy, and made for dipping.

menu.name: Egg Roll (Veggie)
menu.desc: Golden, crispy, and loaded with fresh cabbage, celery, carrots, onions, and savory seasonings, our veggie egg roll delivers big flavor in every bite. A Midwest takeout favoriteâhot, crunchy, and made for dipping.

seo.title: Lou Wok Rice House - St. Louis Original Fried Rice
seo.description: Lou Wok Rice House was built for the transplants, the foodies, the people who moved to Phoenix and couldn't find the flavors they grew up with.
seo.keywords: Fried rice phoenix, Crab rangoon phoenix, St Paul sandwich, Lou wok fried rice, Chicken fried rice, Vegetable fried rice, Fried chicken wings, Egg foo young, Phoenix fried rice, Phoenix fried chicken wings, Chinese food, St. Louis original fried rice,

branding.name: Lou Wok Rice House
branding.tagline: Wok-fired midwest flavor, built for Phoenix.
branding.footerCredit: Built with fire in the Valley

settings.pickupInstructions: Pickup only. Estimated Wait Time 10-15 minutes
